title: kalimeris procera
intro: Kalimeris procera is a plant species commonly known as the tall aster or broad-leaved kalimeris, native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Kalimeris procera include its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, Kalimeris procera is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
